recommendations.title: The King
recommendations.overview: England, 15th century. Hal, a capricious prince who lives among the populace far from court, is forced by circumstances to reluctantly accept the throne and become Henry V.

recommendations.title: The Rover

recommendations.title: Christy

recommendations.title: Where Eagles Dare

recommendations.title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
recommendations.overview: After the insane General Jack D. Ripper initiates a nuclear strike on the Soviet Union, a war room full of politicians, generals and a Russian diplomat all frantically try to stop it.

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda
recommendations.overview: Inspired by true events, this film takes place in Rwanda in the 1990s when more than a million Tutsis were killed in a genocide that went mostly unnoticed by the rest of the world. Hotel owner Paul Rusesabagina houses over a thousand refuges in his h

recommendations.title: The Breadwinner
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young girl in Afghanistan, ruled by the Taliban, disguises herself as a boy in order to provide for her family.

recommendations.title: Guy Ritchie's The Covenant
recommendations.overview: During the war in Afghanistan, a local interpreter risks his own life to carry an injured sergeant across miles of grueling terrain.
